items.caption_text: For all the younger versions of us growing up somewhere like Rhode Island with six brothers, pretending to go to soccer practice when we were really going to sewing class and reading Runway under the covers at night with a flashlight ❤️🌈❤️ #TheDevilWearsPrada2 @20thcenturystudios

items.caption_text:
We made Cyrus Veyssi, the internet’s self-proclaimed “bougie gay uncle,” choose their top fragrance—and we didn’t go easy on them!

The global content creator and TikTok star was host of @scentbird’s 2nd Annual Digital Fragrance Awards. #fragrance #perfume

items.caption_text:
@CyrusVeyssi first went viral *by accident.* (Iconic.)

The internet’s self-proclaimed “bougie gay uncle” skyrocketed to fame for their hilarious, self-shot videos, which often feature their father, @YourFavoriteBaba.

“I started to build that character online and it became this sort of intersection between myself and a performance,” Veyssi tells host Kim Peiffer (@PeifferK1) on this week’s episode of #ForbesTaksShop. “Finding the places where I could incorporate my organic voice into joy and into characters has been my focus.”

This week, Veyssi kicks off Season Two to discuss the routines and tools that fuel their success. Watch the full episode at the link in our bio.

items.caption_text:
If only the Kardashians had brought @kevinphuynh on vacation! Losing an earring sucks, but InStyle’s Fashion Director shows you how to turn it into a gain when @cyrusveyssi pulls a Kim on the streets of NYC. No ugly crying here…just ZHUZH (or is it TZHUJ?) it! 

Host: @kevinphuynh
Head of Entertainment: @actuallyjonathanborge
Director: @saharapagan
DP: @sheaduplechain
Cam Op: @_marjoreo_
Editor: @livmendo
PA: @sydney.somerville
